gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (radeonsi, gfx1201, LLVM 20.1.8, DRM 3.64, 6.16.0-5-cachyos)

notes: Menu shows up to change graphic settings but once you press Start Game, an error pops up.
On PC, I discovered it was attempting to change the reg for something and I don't think the game launches without it.

Unfortunately out of the box the game does not launch, however there are some quite involved steps to get it to work for people who are equipped to tinker: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3697492100

The game opens to the configuration launcher where you can change settings. When you hit play game, it asks if you want to "Register the registry." Clicking yes throws an unhandled exception error, clicking no puts you back into the configuration launcher and does not do anything. Not possible to start the actual game.
